title: Prop X delivery fee cap
prompt: San Francisco is voting on a measure that would cap food delivery app fees (DoorDash, Uber Eats) at 15%. As a resident, would you vote Yes or No? Give your single most important reason in one sentence.

responses.response: I would vote yes because reducing delivery fees aligns with my practical interest in maintaining household stability amidst San Francisco's high cost of living.
responses.reason: The cap would help reduce the cost of food delivery for residents like myself who frequently rely on these services due to busy schedules, thus making living in an expensive city like San Francisco slightly more affordable.

responses.response: Yes, As a renter with a high household income in an expensive city, I believe capping food delivery app fees at 15% would help small restaurants and food establishments in my neighborhood stay afloat and continue to provide affordable options for residents like me.
